title: senecio iberensis
intro: Senecio iberensis, also known as Spanish groundsel, is a perennial plant species native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Senecio iberensis include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its anti-arthritic and antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are believed to promote relaxation, reduce fever, and aid in the treatment of various respiratory and gastrointestinal disorders.
